Video.summary: Explore a whole new world under the sea alongside some of the most adorable and mystical marine life.
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 3.3

Video.summary: When the wild tries to find a HOME in ours
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 3.8

Video.summary: Explore a whole new world under the sea alongside some of the most adorable and mystical marine life.
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 3.3

Video.summary: When the wild tries to find a HOME in ours
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 3.8

Video.summary: A mysterious fever overwhelms Mark as he struggles to fulfil a childhood dream. He must use every ounce of inner strength to journey to the mouth of hell, and make it out alive.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Uphill Battle

Video.summary: Mark & Jaclyn chase extreme winter weather as Nor’easters hammer Atlantic Canada.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Relentless Winter

Video.summary: A mysterious fever overwhelms Mark as he struggles to fulfil a childhood dream. He must use every ounce of inner strength to journey to the mouth of hell, and make it out alive.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Uphill Battle

Video.summary: Mark & Jaclyn chase extreme winter weather as Nor’easters hammer Atlantic Canada.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Relentless Winter

Video.summary: A mysterious fever overwhelms Mark as he struggles to fulfil a childhood dream. He must use every ounce of inner strength to journey to the mouth of hell, and make it out alive.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Uphill Battle

Video.summary: While the Chief is out of town, a house fire breaks out in a remote part of Slave Lake.
Video.title: Hellfire Heroes | Trial By Fire

Video.summary: Firefighters burn grass fields hoping to prevent a repeat of the 2011 wildfires that devastated the town.
Video.title: Hellfire Heroes | Wildfire Season

Video.summary: Firefighters race to rescue a trapped child; a truck loaded with flammable welding tanks burns out of control.
Video.title: Hellfire Heroes | Jack-Of-All-Trades

Video.summary: A man gets trapped in his pickup after a high-speed collision; a car fire raises suspicions of foul play.
Video.title: Hellfire Heroes | Wheels That Fail

Video.summary: Firefighters and survivors share their stories; experts discuss the reality of wildfires.
Video.title: Hellfire Heroes | Not If, But When

Image.alt: Hellfire Heroes | Not If, But When
Hellfire Heroes | Not If, But When
Hellfire Heroes | Not If, But When

Video.summary: Firefighters perform a ride inspection at a travelling carnival; firefighters extinguish a blazing ATV.
Video.title: Hellfire Heroes | Endless Summer

Video.summary: Trouble during a training session; a rollover traps 4 people and ejects 2 others into a swift-moving river.
Video.title: Hellfire Heroes | What It Takes

Video.summary: A springtime blizzard has firefighters working overtime; a pickup hits a semi; a space heater sparks a fire.
Video.title: Hellfire Heroes | Weather Extremes

Video.summary: In the porous limestone of Canada’s West Coast, great forces are at work under the ground, building and eroding the underground into fantastic shapes. In this episode we’ll witness George’s explorations of these massive underground cave systems.
Video.title: Angry Planet | B.C. Caving

Video.summary: Stormchasing developed in Australia in the same period – the 1990s – as it developed in the American Midwest. In the first week of December – the height of storm season in Australia, we plan to travel with Jimmy Deguara, the most experienced of Australian stormchasers.
Video.title: Angry Planet | Thunder Down Under

Video.summary: Italy is one of the very few nations in the world that regularly gets three major extreme natural phenomena – volcanos, flooding, and avalanches. Eastern flanks of the volcano to slip by up to two metres, and many houses on the flanks of the volcano experienced structural damage. The eruption also completely destroyed the Rifugio Sapienza, on the southern flank of the volcano. The Rifugio was the site of a cable car station which had previously been destroyed in the 1983 eruption; both have now been rebuilt. The most recent eruption was in November 2006.
Video.title: Angry Planet | Italia Wild

Video.summary: It is time for “Angry Planet” to do a serious desert episode. What better place to do it than this fabled city in the middle of the mighty Sahara Desert.This almost mythical place really does exist. And it really is still possible to travel there by camel caravan, riding the infamous “Ships of the Desert”. Extreme heat, dehydration, possible sand storms, frigid night temperatures and desert predators are our potential companions for the trip.
Video.title: Angry Planet | By Camel to Timbuktu

Image.alt: Angry Planet | By Camel to Timbuktu
Angry Planet | By Camel to Timbuktu
Angry Planet | By Camel to Timbuktu

Video.summary: Geoorge explores Java at the heart of the Ring of Fire.
Video.title: Angry Planet | Java - Land of Fire

Image.alt: Angry Planet | Java - Land of Fire
Angry Planet | Java - Land of Fire
Angry Planet | Java - Land of Fire

Video.summary: “Angry Planet” is there as 3 storms make landfall as hurricanes in the US.
Video.title: Angry Planet | Hurricane Triple Threat

Video.summary: No-one creates eco-disasters on quite the scale of the former Soviet Union. In Uzbekistan, the Aral Sea, once one of the largest freshwater lakes in the world, has seen its waters diverted, so that it has shrunk to 1/6 its previous size. In Crimea, a mountain has been carved into a james bondian submarine base. In northern Ukraine, the Chernobyl nuclear site has been reduced to a radioactive wasteland.
Video.title: Angry Planet | Eco-Disasters

Video.summary: George returns to the “Fin Del Mundo” at the southern tip of Argentina, this time to sail on a Russian icebreaker to Antarctica. After braving the stormy Drake passage, he explores volcanic Deception Island, camps out in the Antarctic snow, and paddles a kayak through icebergs calved off the melting glaciers.
Video.title: Angry Planet | Antarctica

Video.summary: In the porous limestone of Canada’s West Coast, great forces are at work under the ground, building and eroding the underground into fantastic shapes. In this episode we’ll witness George’s explorations of these massive underground cave systems.
Video.title: Angry Planet | B.C. Caving

Video.summary: Stormchasing developed in Australia in the same period – the 1990s – as it developed in the American Midwest. In the first week of December – the height of storm season in Australia, we plan to travel with Jimmy Deguara, the most experienced of Australian stormchasers.
Video.title: Angry Planet | Thunder Down Under

Video.summary: Italy is one of the very few nations in the world that regularly gets three major extreme natural phenomena – volcanos, flooding, and avalanches. Eastern flanks of the volcano to slip by up to two metres, and many houses on the flanks of the volcano experienced structural damage. The eruption also completely destroyed the Rifugio Sapienza, on the southern flank of the volcano. The Rifugio was the site of a cable car station which had previously been destroyed in the 1983 eruption; both have now been rebuilt. The most recent eruption was in November 2006.
Video.title: Angry Planet | Italia Wild

Video.summary: It is time for “Angry Planet” to do a serious desert episode. What better place to do it than this fabled city in the middle of the mighty Sahara Desert.This almost mythical place really does exist. And it really is still possible to travel there by camel caravan, riding the infamous “Ships of the Desert”. Extreme heat, dehydration, possible sand storms, frigid night temperatures and desert predators are our potential companions for the trip.

After braving the stormy Drake passage, he explores volcanic Deception Island, camps out in the Antarctic snow, and paddles a kayak through icebergs calved off the melting glaciers.
